purpose: Eligibility or empanelment to receive government, authority, or institutional work orders.
likely_user_role: vendor, consultant, agency, or service provider

expected_clauses.why_expected: Scope defines what work orders may cover.
Payment triggers and approvals matter because work may be order-based.
Suspension, cancellation, or removal from panel can affect future revenue.
Compliance failures can cause blacklisting, debarment, or eligibility loss.
Performance criteria and acceptance affect work allocation and payment.

false_positive_guardrails: Do not classify as freelance contract just because client, services, or deliverables appear.
Missing IP is not a major risk unless creative/software/content deliverables are central.
No guaranteed work is not automatically illegal, but it is commercially material and should be surfaced.
